name: Gujerati-Style Cabbage with Carrots (Sambhara)
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the cabbage and cut it into fine, long shreds.
2. Peel the carrots and grate them coarsely.
3. Cut the green chili into thin, long strips.
4. Heat the oil in a wide, casserole-type pot over medium-high flame.
5. When hot, add the asafetida.
6. Add the mustard seeds; they will begin to pop within seconds.
7. As soon as the mustard seeds start popping, add the dried red chili and stir once.
8. The chili should turn dark red in a few seconds.
9. Add the cabbage, carrots, and green chili; reduce heat to medium.
10. Stir the vegetables for about half a minute.
11. Add the salt, sugar, and chopped coriander; continue stirring until cooked through but still crisp.
12. Mix in the lemon juice.
13. Remove the whole dried red chili before serving those unfamiliar with Indian cuisine.
